name: trading-agent
title: Trading Agent
description: Dry-run-first economic agent scaffold for Base payments, Bankr-style actions, receipts, eval, and observability.
goldenInput: dry-run swapping 5 USDC to ETH on Base Sepolia
refusalInput: trade without a cap or idempotency key
memoryMode: Stores trade simulations, receipts, and reflection records locally.
